_comment: Species: Heavenly Bull Soul Beast (天牛魂兽) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Heavenly Bull Soul Beast

canonical.appearance: Bull-shaped soul beast 8 m, body semi-translucent, horns radiate soul-power
canonical.behavior: Soul beast of Heavenly Bull Continent; cultivates by absorbing soul-essence
canonical.habitat: Heavenly Bull Continent, soul-aspected spirit veins
canonical.relationships: Connected to Heavenly Bull Soul Armour (canon treasure)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: heavenly_bull_soul_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
